# CWE-565 positive: delete trusts unverified role cookie (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-565-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func DeleteTenantRecord(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	role, err := r.Cookie("role")
	if err != nil || role.Value != "admin" {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	_, _ = db.Exec("DELETE FROM tenants WHERE id = ?", r.PathValue("id"))
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
